utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: 'September 1–5, 2024' — specified with exact dates. 
3. transportation: 'Standard Airline, Economy Class, €220 round-trip' — includes flight details and cost, so fully specified.

5. activities: Each activity listed with cost and date — fully specified. 
6. additional_services: Multiple services listed with costs — fully specified. 
7. total_budget: '€1,145' — complete cost breakdown as total. All 7 items are included and fully specified.
